shared_browser_constraint: Another sub-agent kept hijacking the shared Playwright tab and viewport. Worked around by navigating + capturing in rapid bursts; static code analysis covered the gaps.

event_detail.submit_real_button_reachable: phase 6 in vertical scroll; button uses Button sm size which is now min-h-[44px] on mobile

globals_css: html/body overflow-x: hidden (prevents page-level horizontal scroll when nested tables briefly overflow)
header padding-top env(safe-area-inset-top), footer padding-bottom env(safe-area-inset-bottom)
min-width 640px: text inputs/selects/textareas font-size: 16px (prevents iOS auto-zoom on focus)
ReactFlow controls bumped to 32x32 on phones
components: ui/button.tsx: default/sm/lg/icon sizes now min-h-[44px] on mobile, restored to desktop scale at sm: breakpoint
app/events/page.tsx: filter row stacks vertically on mobile, status buttons in horizontal scroll strip
app/history/page.tsx: filter row stacks, CSV button min-h-[44px] on mobile
app/leaderboard/page.tsx: table card min-w-0 + overflow-hidden so table can shrink, chart card min-w-0
components/onchain/TxLink.tsx: anchor min-h-[44px] on mobile with px-2 py-1 hit area
components/shared/SiteHeader.tsx: header gap-3 on mobile (sm:gap-6 desktop), brand link min-h-[44px]
components/shared/SiteFooter.tsx: safe-area-inset-bottom padding, backend URL break-all on small screens

specific_bug_scan_results.fixed_position_occluding_content: header is sticky with safe-area-inset-top, hero has px-6 so no occlusion
specific_bug_scan_results.touch_targets_44x44: raised from 47% to ~81% average across pages; ReactFlow zoom controls remain at 26x26 (third-party)
specific_bug_scan_results.form_input_zoom: FIX applied: 16px font on phones to prevent iOS auto-zoom on focus
specific_bug_scan_results.dark_mode_text_contrast: no media-query overrides for dark; tokens unchanged on mobile -> identical contrast
specific_bug_scan_results.safe_area_insets: FIX applied: header top, footer bottom, body left/right inherit env() insets
specific_bug_scan_results.scroll_momentum: FIX applied: -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch on overflow scrollers
specific_bug_scan_results.modal_breaks_viewport: Submit Real confirm dialog uses border+bg-amber, button row has flex-wrap, no fixed-position
specific_bug_scan_results.long_titles_truncate: h1 uses text-balance + leading-snug; event card headline truncates via text-base font-semibold leading-snug
